prompt: Open Calendar.app and use the search feature to find the event titled 'KinBench Search 193'. Read its start date and write the date in YYYY-MM-DD format to ~/Desktop/kinbench/193-found.txt. Fast path: `cerebellum 'calendar find_event_ymd "KinBench Search 193" ~/Desktop/kinbench/193-found.txt'` (writes the YYYY-MM-DD directly, no agent parsing needed).
